root_cause: Upstream ttyd 1.7.7 official Windows binary is MinGW-W64 cross-compiled. On Windows 11 25H2 (build 26200) ConPTY's internal CreateProcessW returns error 123 (ERROR_INVALID_NAME) and the ttyd process access-violates as a secondary symptom. Tracked at ttyd issue #1501; PR #1502 (MSVC build) merged upstream but no release yet.
spawn_options_irrelevant: We confirmed by trying baseline / no windowsHide / cmd.exe wrapper / shell:true / detached / cmd.exe /c start /b /min /wait / PowerShell Start-Process — none changed the failure. PowerShell+Start-Process kept ttyd alive briefly but it still crashed the moment a client connected (HTTP/WebSocket handshake), confirming the bug is inside ttyd's libuv ConPTY init, not in how we spawn it.
